chunks.title: Oracle Against Gog and the Feast of Birds
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic oracle detailing Yahweh's judgment on Gog, the destruction of his army, the seven-year fuel supply from weapons, the burial in Hamon-gog, and the great feast for birds.

chunks.title: Restoration of Israel
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle promising the return of Jacob's fortunes, the cleansing of their dishonor, and the pouring out of God's Spirit upon them.
